missingness: No production cohort logs, curator labels, or empirical leakage measurements are attached yet.
revision_reason: Static privacy labels are insufficient for repeated longitudinal health-memory retrieval.
falsification_route: Reject or revise the gate if repeated-query simulation does not reduce contextual leakage risk without destroying useful cohort comparison utility.
next_executable_action: Run validator and add CI coverage after repository test harness is consolidated.

data_context.data_type: longitudinal symptom and cohort comparison packet
data_context.rare_feature_handling: Rare feature combinations must be coarsened or replaced with synthetic baseline descriptors.

query_context.retrieval_scope: cohort-level comparison with no raw identifiers

risk_model.utility_metric: trajectory comparison remains answerable after coarsening

decision.reason: Reusable memory is allowed only after cohort-level coarsening and repeated-query risk accounting.
